Nestle India Ltd

Nestle India Summary Chart Analysis Peers Quarters Profit & Loss Balance Sheet Cash Flow Ratios Investors Documents

Nestle India Ltd

₹ 1,460 0.94%
03 Jul - close price
nestle.in BSE: 500790 NSE: NESTLEIND
About

Nestle India Limited is a subsidiary of Nestle which is a Swiss MNC. The company operates in the Food segment.

Key Points

Parentage[1] [2]
As of FY26, Switzerland-based Nestlé S.A., the world's largest food and beverage company, held a 62.76% stake in the company. It has access to the parent company's global portfolio of brands, proprietary technologies, and advanced R&D capabilities.

Website BSE NSE
  • Market Cap ₹ 2,81,495 Cr.
  • Current Price ₹ 1,460
  • High / Low ₹ 1,499 / 1,085
  • Stock P/E 82.7
  • Book Value ₹ 26.7
  • Dividend Yield 0.82 %
  • ROCE 85.3 %
  • ROE 74.2 %
  • Face Value ₹ 1.00
Edit ratios

Pros

  • Company has reduced debt.
  • Company is almost debt free.
  • Company has a good return on equity (ROE) track record: 3 Years ROE 89.6%
  • Company has been maintaining a healthy dividend payout of 75.4%

Cons

  • Stock is trading at 54.6 times its book value

* The pros and cons are machine generated. Pros / cons are based on a checklist to highlight important points. Please exercise caution and do your own analysis.

Documents

Announcements

All
  • Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Scrutinizer''s Report 2d
  • Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Outcome of AGM 2d
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Date of payment of Dividend
    2d - Board declared Rs.2 special dividend per share; record date 10 July 2026, payout from 30 July 2026.
  • Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Dividend Updates
    2d - Board declared Rs 2 special dividend per share; record date 10 July 2026, payment from 30 July 2026.
  • Board Meeting Outcome for Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 ('Listing Regulations'): Declaration Of A Special Dividend 2026
    2d - Nestlé India declared special dividend of Rs. 2 per share; record date 10 July 2026, payment from 30 July 2026.
